snippets.description: Full hand-written migration content. Hand-written because bun run db:generate is blocked repo-wide by pre-existing drizzle snapshot-chain drift (see process/general-plans/backlog/drizzle-migration-journal-drift_02-07-26.md) — same precedent as the CAT-1 migrations 0026-0028. Registered at journal idx=33, snapshot-less by the same intentional precedent.
crm_users columns after the split — firstName NOT NULL, lastName nullable, name column removed
snippets.content:
id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
firstName: text('first_name').notNull(),
lastName: text('last_name'),
// login + Better Auth link key; null for former reps (record-only, no login)

snippets.description: New shared derived-name helper — pure, total, never throws
dbUserToUser mapper (G3) — the single canonical name-derivation point for the User shape
G8c — SQL-level concat form used where the raw {authorName} shape must be preserved without a JS .map()
G8h — orderBy/ilike switched to firstName (byte-identical to old name-ordering for verbatim-backfilled rows); select composed via .map()
